mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity cash flows, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate above a 0.2 percentage point threshold over three months signals imminent labor market deterioration and recession risk, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer demand expansion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60d returns in >55% of cases, or interaction term Rank IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Declines in the industrial production index during a late-cycle expansion signal manufacturing weakness and tightening supply margins, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during late-cycle phases are followed by positive 20d returns in >65% of instances, or Rank IC flips sign across regimes.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds a 2.5 percent year-over-year growth threshold, markets price in aggressive central bank tightening and margin compression, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL readings above 2.5% are followed by positive 5d returns in >60% of cases, or the threshold effect vanishes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls and declines in the unemployment rate confirm labor market tightening and wage growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising payrolls and falling unemployment fails to predict positive 20d returns in >50% of triggered months, or interaction Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter increases in real gross domestic product reflect underlying economic expansion and corporate earnings growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show no statistically significant correlation with 60d forward returns, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 across all rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the industrial production index exceeding 1.0 percent signals a manufacturing rebound and improved capacity utilization, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO spikes above 1.0% are followed by negative 5d returns in >55% of instances, or the threshold effect is not robust to walk-forward validation.
